2606.06322.title: DragOn: A Benchmark and Dataset for Drag-Based GUI Interactions
2606.06322.paper_summary: GUI agents - vision-based models that control desktops, web browsers, and mobile devices through graphical user interfaces - promise to automate a wide range of digital tasks. While million-scale datasets have enabled substantial progress on click-grounding, drag grounding (e.g. drag-and-drop, swipe, highlight) data remains an order of magnitude smaller and current models fall short on complex drag-based interactions. We introduce DragOn, a drag grounding benchmark and training dataset covering four domains: text highlighting, cell selection, element resizing and slider manipulation. The dataset comprises 286K training screenshots and 3.5M training tasks, plus a 2000-example held-out evaluation suite. We evaluate proprietary (GPT, Claude) and open-weight (Qwen, Kimi, Holo) models, as well as a Qwen VLM fine-tuned on our training data. Results suggest that our dataset could improve performance of state-of-the-art models on downstream computer-use tasks.
2606.06322.paper_summary_zh: GUI 代理 - 基於視覺的模型，通過圖形用戶界面控制桌面、網頁瀏覽器和移動設備 - 有望自動化廣泛的數位任務。雖然百萬規模的數據集已經促進了點擊定位的重大進展，但拖動定位（例如拖放、滑動、高亮）數據仍然小了一個量級，當前模型在複雜的基於拖動的交互上表現不佳。我們介紹了 DragOn，一個涵蓋四個領域的拖動定位基準和訓練數據集：文本高亮、單元格選擇、元素調整大小和滑塊操作。該數據集包含 286K 的訓練截圖和 3.5M 的訓練任務，以及一個包含 2000 範例的保留評估套件。我們評估了專有模型（GPT、Claude）和開放權重模型（Qwen、Kimi、Holo），以及在我們的訓練數據上微調的 Qwen VLM。結果表明，我們的數據集可能改善最先進模型在下游計算機使用任務上的性能。
2606.06322.author: Nathan Bout et.al.
2606.06322.authors: Nathan Bout, Maxime Langevin, Ronan Riochet
